name: Leader of the pack? [Wolfpack clustering coverage]
description: Computing (UK) analysis of Microsoft's Wolfpack clustering initiative on Windows NT, featuring Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group as a senior expert voice. Kastner warns that no single Wolfpack vendor has a complete clustering toolkit, that one in seven NT investments is aimed at clustering, and cautions enterprises against the 'siren song' of Microsoft-only Wolfpack deployments pending two years of maturation. Article maps the internal Wolfpack split between Tandem Servernet backers (Compaq, Dell, Tandem) and Microsoft-aligned vendors.

creator.name: Ian Ashbridge / Sarah Petrie (reporter); Peter Kastner (quoted source)
